name: End User
description: See through the eyes of the ordinary end user
question: How would an average user experience this?

name: Admin
description: See through the eyes of the system administrator
question: What administration tools are missing or poorly designed?

name: Newcomer
description: See through the eyes of someone discovering the product
question: Is the onboarding intuitive without external help?

name: Power User
description: See through the eyes of an advanced and demanding user
question: What advanced features are missing or too slow?

name: Frustrated User
description: See through the eyes of someone who had a bad experience
question: Which friction points are unbearable over time?

name: Performance
description: Analyze speed, latency, memory and CPU usage
question: Does the system remain smooth under real load?

name: Scalability
description: Analyze the ability to scale up
question: What happens with 10x or 100x the current users?

name: Maintainability
description: Analyze the ease of modifying and evolving the code
question: Can a new dev understand and modify it in under an hour?

name: Testability
description: Analyze the ability to test the code in isolation
question: Can each module be tested without depending on others?

name: Portability
description: Analyze the ease of changing environment or platform
question: Can the project run on another cloud or OS without a redesign?

name: Cost
description: Analyze operational and development costs
question: Is this technical choice too expensive to operate?

name: Time-to-market
description: Analyze the speed of feature delivery
question: How long to deliver the next critical feature?

name: ROI
description: Analyze the return on investment of the project
question: Does the invested effort produce measurable value?

name: Business Risk
description: Analyze strategic and market risks
question: What external events could make this project obsolete?

name: Competition
description: Analyze the position against competitors
question: Are competitors doing better? On which points exactly?

name: External Attacker
description: Simulate an attacker with no initial access to the system
question: What attack surfaces are accessible from the outside?

name: Malicious Insider
description: Simulate an internal user with malicious intent
question: Can a dishonest employee extract or corrupt data?

name: Compliance
description: Verify compliance with applicable regulations
question: GDPR, PCI-DSS, HIPAA: which obligations are not met?

name: Privacy
description: Analyze the collection and processing of personal data
question: Are we collecting more data than necessary?

name: Supply Chain
description: Analyze risks related to external dependencies
question: Would a compromised dependency impact the system?

name: Short Term
description: Analyze the impact over the next 1 to 3 months
question: Does this decision create short-term debt?

name: Medium Term
description: Analyze the impact over the next 6 months
question: Will the architecture hold with 2x growth?

name: Long Term
description: Analyze the impact over 2 years and beyond
question: Will this choice still be relevant in 2 years?

name: Legacy
description: Analyze what this project will leave behind after its end or a pivot
question: If we start from scratch tomorrow, what is worth keeping?

name: Pre-mortem
description: Imagine the project has failed and trace back the cause
question: It failed in 6 months. Why?

name: Worst Case
description: Identify the most likely catastrophic scenario
question: What sequence of events would lead to the worst outcome?

name: Domino Effect
description: Analyze cascading failures
question: If this component goes down, what goes down with it?

name: Point of No Return
description: Identify irreversible decisions
question: What decision made today would be impossible to undo tomorrow?

name: Anti-brainstorm
description: Invert the problem: how to make it even worse?
question: How could we deliberately sabotage this project?

name: Remove Constraints
description: Imagine the main constraint disappears
question: If the budget were unlimited, what would we do differently?

name: Competitor View
description: Analyze from the position of a direct competitor
question: How would a competitor exploit our current weaknesses?
